{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032123173198C36687A36A6072CECD"}"},"total":598},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7398077515803444030","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"一段影视完成接着去下一个，不错，曹贼，后宫，是我喜欢的，满星，希望作者再接再厉，也可以写下好先生，都挺好，北京爱情故事，小舍得之类的","text_exts":[{"e":63,"s":60,"text":"小舍得","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%B0%8F%E8%88%8D%E5%BE%97&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741062516072CECD%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227398077515803444030%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227363824634078186558%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%B0%8F%E8%88%8D%E5%BE%97%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1722501706,"group_id":"7363824634078186558","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6HaJGQvqNvdAuSN89LGYp2pj7Q4PlrmAIEYMqV1KVUF","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/345297d16cfd4e7db2f22f4d7b759496~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776623148&x-signature=%2BZAk64KdZFhd4duujkfk8aRjXvE%3D","user_id":"3450681656878584","user_name":"继承曹丞相之遗志"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3450681656878584","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7363824634078186558","book_info":{"abstract":"影视穿越，主角在每个影视世界都会有一个特殊的天赋，比如在四合院会获得日薪月异，每天都会获得某个人一个月的工资，但是如果这个人没有工资，那他就也得不到工资，每月关联一个人物，其他技能还在设想中，大家有什么想法也可以留言，目前计划是每次出现都是单个影视剧世界，后期可能会加入融合世界，单女主，多女主世界穿插出现。新手作者，先拿老剧咱们结婚吧练练手，后期想看到哪个影视女主大家踊跃报名。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/a6305a236f842133674a574b85265b9e","author":"赚钱冲A股","author_id":"","book_id":"7363824634078186558","book_name":"我在影视世界的精彩人生","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281810","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7363824638184407614","read_count":"30110","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2743214"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.8","serial_count":"1306","tags":"男频衍生,穿越,诸天万界,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7fec5817497a85cb829c83e2db4cd4c9~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779290251&x-signature=oCdmF6%2F1SDLpX3VCBYEUKdnAST8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"769263019759796","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"291"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032123173198C36687A36A6072CECD"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":18671,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":9045},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7387801981962552126","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"刚开始都还有很多屌丝男主常见的毛病，后面就越写越好了。三十而已是很惊艳的，对这个世界里男主的塑造在同类型同人世界里是很出彩的，作者有自己的想法和处理，比很多千篇一律的三十而已同人强多了，即使写的是后宫多女主也写的更流畅更自然，更容易接受，在感情处理上罕见地还挺细腻，比一开始强多了，加油","text_exts":[{"e":31,"s":27,"text":"三十而已","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%89%E5%8D%81%E8%80%8C%E5%B7%B2&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741062516072CECD%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227387801981962552126%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227363824634078186558%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%89%E5%8D%81%E8%80%8C%E5%B7%B2%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1720109402,"group_id":"7363824634078186558","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"热爱小说、文学，热爱剧本杀，人文美食纪录片十级爱好者。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+fqjIwe+vpjpYFy51hdh68=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/d4311c28ba7b4df8bbcc821633826d76~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776623119&x-signature=beGMKkpQ%2FNsx1zVUylsgw8wovfg%3D","user_id":"111316625801","user_name":"一口猪肘饭"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"111316625801","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1733130936,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7363824634078186558","book_info":{"abstract":"影视穿越，主角在每个影视世界都会有一个特殊的天赋，比如在四合院会获得日薪月异，每天都会获得某个人一个月的工资，但是如果这个人没有工资，那他就也得不到工资，每月关联一个人物，其他技能还在设想中，大家有什么想法也可以留言，目前计划是每次出现都是单个影视剧世界，后期可能会加入融合世界，单女主，多女主世界穿插出现。新手作者，先拿老剧咱们结婚吧练练手，后期想看到哪个影视女主大家踊跃报名。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/a6305a236f842133674a574b85265b9e","author":"赚钱冲A股","author_id":"","book_id":"7363824634078186558","book_name":"我在影视世界的精彩人生","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281810","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7363824638184407614","read_count":"30110","title_page_ta
